# Kastriot Tanaj — SEO & AI Automation Consultant New York

> New York SEO consultant and AI automation expert helping NYC businesses rank #1 on Google and automate growth. AI-powered SEO strategies, business automation workflows, and proven results across Europe and the USA.

## About

Kastriot Tanaj is an SEO consultant with 4+ years of experience and 100+ clients served. Starting in Switzerland in 2021, he quickly mastered SEO and delivered page 1 rankings for companies like STS Company. By 2023, he had expanded across Europe — working with clients in Germany (AT BAU GmbH, Cologne), the Netherlands (Faralda Crane Hotel, Amsterdam), and Kosovo. In 2024, he integrated AI-powered tools into SEO workflows, combining marketing expertise with automation to help businesses automate repetitive tasks, reporting, and growth processes. Now he is bringing battle-tested European SEO expertise and AI automation solutions to the most competitive market in the world — New York City.

## Services

### SEO Strategy & Consulting
Comprehensive SEO audits, competitive analysis, and custom roadmaps tailored to your business goals. Identifies the highest-impact opportunities to get you ranking in New York and beyond.

### AI-Powered Content Systems
Scalable content pipelines using AI to produce high-ranking, engaging content. From blog posts to landing pages, builds systems that generate traffic-driving content at speed.

### AI Automation Workflows for Businesses
Save hours every week with AI-powered automation for SEO reporting, rank tracking, lead nurturing, and marketing workflows. Custom business automation solutions that streamline operations and keep your growth machine running on autopilot.

### 1-on-1 SEO Coaching
Personalized coaching for founders, marketers, and in-house teams who want to build SEO expertise. Learn the strategies and tools the pros use.

## Portfolio

Real SEO results: page 1 rankings for clients across Europe and New York. Case studies from STS Company (Switzerland), Faralda Crane Hotel (Amsterdam), AT BAU GmbH (Cologne), and more. Full case studies available at https://kastriottanaj.com/portfolio.

## Blog

Expert SEO tips, AI automation insights, and digital marketing strategies. Actionable advice for ranking higher in New York and beyond. Read at https://kastriottanaj.com/blog.

### Featured Article: AI Search SEO

**AI Search SEO: How NYC Businesses Get Cited in ChatGPT, AI Overviews & Perplexity** — https://kastriottanaj.com/blog/ai-search-seo

A pillar guide to Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for businesses in New York City. Covers what AI Search SEO actually means, why NYC businesses can't afford to wait, the four AI search engines that matter in 2026 (Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Gemini), and how AI engines choose what to cite (retrieval, grounding, authority, freshness). Includes a 10-point AI Search SEO playbook covering classic search visibility, extractable answers, entity clarity, brand mentions, structured data and llms.txt, topical clusters, freshness discipline, Reddit and third-party authority, local NYC signals, and tracking AI citations. Written by Kastriot Tanaj, an SEO and AI automation consultant working with NYC businesses.
